title: linaria verticillata
intro: Linaria verticillata, also known as the Whirling Campion, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia. It is a biennial herb with a long history of use in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, providing relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis. Linaria verticillata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in folk medicine to treat skin conditions and wounds.
